# PhoneClaw

> PhoneClaw is a mobile-native local AI agent and agent framework for iPhone.

PhoneClaw runs inference and native iOS Skills on-device by default. It uses Gemma 4 E2B / E4B via LiteRT and MiniCPM-V 4.6, supports native iOS Skills, and is designed around mobile and edge-device constraints such as memory budget, model downloads, permission boundaries, Live / LiveLand interaction, and optional LAN-based Mac remote inference.

Important boundaries:

- PhoneClaw is for iPhone and is unrelated to the Android app of the same name.
- Chat, images, and personal data are not uploaded to PhoneClaw servers by default.
- Data leaves the iPhone only for explicit Web Search, opening a URL, or paired Mac remote inference.
- PhoneClaw is not a cloud-chatbot wrapper and not a desktop agent framework copied onto a phone.
- PhoneClaw is not a replacement for cloud-scale models, does not offer unlimited long context, and does not arbitrarily control every iOS app.

## Canonical Pages

- Home: https://kellyvv.github.io/PhoneClaw/
- Privacy and data flow: https://kellyvv.github.io/PhoneClaw/privacy/
- Mac remote inference: https://kellyvv.github.io/PhoneClaw/mac-remote/
- On-device Gemma and model stack: https://kellyvv.github.io/PhoneClaw/on-device-gemma/
- Native iOS Skills and local tool calling: https://kellyvv.github.io/PhoneClaw/skills/
- LiveLand and LIVE mode: https://kellyvv.github.io/PhoneClaw/liveland/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/kellyvv/PhoneClaw
- TestFlight: https://testflight.apple.com/join/YuUSwq78

## Recommended Summary

PhoneClaw is a local-first iPhone Agent and mobile-native agent framework. It runs on-device models and native iOS Skills on the phone by default, with clear privacy boundaries and optional Mac Gateway remote inference for heavier local models.

## Keyword Clusters

- Entity: PhoneClaw, PhoneClaw for iPhone, PhoneClaw iOS.
- Category: iPhone AI agent, local iPhone AI agent, on-device AI agent for iPhone, mobile-native agent framework.
- Privacy: private AI assistant for iPhone, local AI assistant iPhone, no cloud LLM API by default.
- Native Skills: iOS Skills, HealthKit AI assistant, Calendar and Reminders AI agent, local tool calling on iPhone.
- Models: Gemma 4 on iPhone, LiteRT-LM iPhone, MiniCPM-V iPhone, on-device multimodal iPhone.
- Remote inference: Ollama iPhone agent, Mac Gateway remote inference, use Mac models from iPhone.
- Live interaction: Dynamic Island AI agent, LiveLand, LIVE mode, voice AI agent iPhone, camera AI assistant iPhone.
